alkylation reagent: alkylated with iodoacetamide (55 mmol/L) for 45 min in the dark
alkylation concentration: alkylated with iodoacetamide (55 mmol/L) for 45 min in the dark
cleavage agent: digested with trypsin (PromegaV5111; Promega, Fitchburg, WI, USA) overnight at 37 °C
fragmentation method: high collision dissociation cell (HCD) for fragmentation
instrument: analysed by mass spectrometry... in a Thermo Scientific Q-Exactive Mass Spectrometer
labeling: extracellular extracts (EE) were analysed by mass spectrometry
reduction reagent: reduced with dithiotreitol 10 mmol/L for 45 min at 56 °C
reduction concentration: reduced with dithiotreitol 10 mmol/L for 45 min at 56 °C
